content:
{
  "artifact_type": "srx_ace_workflow",
  "depth_tier": "D2_PRODUCTION",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Build an SRX ACE workflow for compliance evidence collection and validation, tailored for a Latin American enterprise compliance lead, using the market_lens to handle high-urgency, low-context inputs with explicit validation gates.",
    "Scope": "The workflow ingests messy, high-urgency compliance evidence requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), processes them through structured validation gates, and produces a governed artifact compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must operate within Latin American regulatory frameworks (e.g., LGPD, GDPR alignment, local data sovereignty).",
      "All evidence must pass explicit validation gates before acceptance.",
      "Workflow must handle ambiguous or incomplete inputs without halting.",
      "Output must be SR8-compilable with strict JSON schema adherence.",
      "No execution of legal, financial, or compliance advice; only workflow orchestration."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Workflow processes at least 10 high-urgency, low-context inputs without failure.",
      "Each input is routed through at least 3 validation gates (context completeness, regulatory match, evidence quality).",
      "Final artifact includes all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.",
      "Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail logs for audit."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "type": "srx_ace_workflow",
      "sections": [
        "objective",
        "scope",
        "constraints",
        "success_criteria",
        "output_contract"
      ],
      "format": "strict JSON",
      "validation_gates": [
        "gate_1_context_completeness",
        "gate_2_regulatory_match",
        "gate_3_evidence_quality"
      ],
      "audit_trail": true
    }
  }
}
